title: Charge case inside screen/forth screen, left zoom in/out
feature: QSG (Quick Start Guide) - Charge Case Screen
scenario: Verify zoom in/out functionality on the charge case screen in QSG by clicking the circle button to toggle between zoomed-in view with new text and original view.
steps: Verify zoom in with new text appearing
Verify zoom out returns to the original charge case screen
expected: Zoom in shows new text; zoom out returns to the original charge case screen.
